attributes.action: Include domestic heating oil in the energy price cap.
attributes.additional_details:
domestic heating oil prices have increased from 62 pence a litre to £1.40 a litre. 100% increase in a matter of days due to the war in Iran.
This will drive many people into fuel poverty who need heating still mainly in the north of england and scotland,
attributes.background: Vote to include domestic heating oil to have a price cap and come under the control of ofgem.

departments.name: Department for Energy Security and Net Zero

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Regulate companies supplying heating oil and LPG'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764213
